title: Chemical constituents of Lasia spinosa, Mussaenda incana and Wendlandia tinctoria
author: B. Dinda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Tripura University, Agartala-799 130, India 

  E-mail : dindabtu@rediffmail.com   Fax: 91-0381-2374801 

 School of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Kitasato University, Minato-ku, Tokyo-! 08 8641, Japan 

  Manuscript received 1 November 2002, revised 3 April 2003, accepted 11 July 2003  

 Isolation of  β -sitosterol acetate, stigmasterol and its acetate from the rhizome of  Lasia spinosa ; two new triterpcne esters-3- palmitoyllupeol 1 and 3-benzoylepibetulin 2 along with  β -sitosterol from the stem of  Mussαendα incαnα ; and a new aliphatic myricyl stearate 3 along with stearic acid,  d -mannitol, geniposidic acid 4,  β -sitosterol and stigmasterol from the stem of  Wendlandia tinctoria  are being reported.
